crossSurfaceHierarchy.Advisor: Advisor is the technical/architecture note system.
crossSurfaceHierarchy.Agents: Agents are supervised roles, not bots.
crossSurfaceHierarchy.Activity Feed: Activity Feed is the human-readable mission feed.

consolidatedVisualRules: max one dominant focus plus three secondary blocks

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Expose the active mission, phase, risk, evidence, and blocked capabilities.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What mission is active and what needs attention now?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.allowedActions: Review phase, view evidence, review blocked capabilities as preview-only actions.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No runtime, no capability enablement, no source-of-truth promotion.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: why, missing, evidence, action, disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Migrate after token integration and shell ownership are defined.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Show mission progress as research journal and governance record.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: How did the mission evolve and what evidence supports each step?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: blocked entries must explain why, missing, evidence, action, and disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Fixture-only migration before any productive timeline authority.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Present evidence as research archive and governance binder.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What artifact proves the decision or risk state?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: evidence gaps must show required proof and disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Do not promote archive previews to productive evidence store.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Frame human authority through executive decision cards.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What should be approved, deferred, or rejected and why?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.allowedActions: Approve, defer, reject, and request evidence as no-op options.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: high-risk cards must show why, missing, evidence, action, disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires approval mutation ADR before product behavior.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Surface architectural concerns as technical notes, not chat.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What risk or contradiction needs senior attention?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.allowedActions: Acknowledge or convert to decision as preview-only actions.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No LLM-backed advisor and no provider activity.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: advisor warnings must show impact, recommendation, evidence, and status
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Keep advisor note pattern separate from chat UI.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Govern capability scope, status, evidence, and risk.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What permission is blocked or ready and what proof is required?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No productive consent and no capability enablement.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: capability cards must explain why, missing, evidence, action, disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires productive consent storage milestone before product use.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Communicate local-first safety and disabled execution.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: Is runtime active, and what remains blocked?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: runtime states must explain why, missing, evidence, action, disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: No runtime migration until no-runtime-coupling tests exist.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Show model policy, exposure, budget, and blocked provider activity.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What model policy exists and why are calls disabled?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No LLM Provider Calls and no workspace context sent.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: model cards must explain policy gaps and disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires prompt and provider governance before product behavior.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Present supervised mission roles with no execution authority.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What role could help, and what authority is denied?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No real agents and no autonomous execution.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: agent cards must show authority and policy boundaries
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires agent runtime governance before product behavior.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Review governance configuration without enabling features.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: Which defaults are active or blocked and why?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: settings cards must disclose preview-only behavior
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires settings storage and rollback plan before product migration.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Render mission activity in human-readable form.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What happened, who did it, and what evidence or commit is linked?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No feed persistence and no timeline mutation.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: blocked feed rows must explain why, missing, evidence, action, disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires source-of-truth boundary tests before product migration.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Make every blocked state trustworthy and actionable.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: Why is this blocked and what proof is required?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: why, missing, evidence, action, disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Must be preserved in every future screen.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Show gate status without granting access.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: What gate is required before future enablement?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: missing requirements and required evidence must be explicit
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Requires gate implementation milestone before product behavior.

surfaceConsistencyMatrix.purpose: Explain absence of data without implying failure.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.primaryUserQuestion: Why is this empty and what is the safe next step?
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.previewRestrictions: No automatic creation or runtime action.
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.blockedStateRequirements: empty states must show safe next step and disabled surfaces
surfaceConsistencyMatrix.futureMigrationNotes: Add during product UI migration QA.
